title: Quantic Dream developers warn that Star Wars Eclipse cannot be finished without more staff
summary: Studio employees are on strike over mass layoffs, jeopardizing the game's completion.

title: Rockstar will not release GTA 6 physically, not at launch nor months later
summary: New reports contradict official support and confirm the game will be digital only.

title: Lenovo forecasts RAM prices will remain high until 2030 and become the new normal
summary: The manufacturer warns that the memory crisis will not be resolved soon and costs will not return to previous levels.

title: Rivals of Aether II adds Gouie and Mina the Hollower as guest fighters
summary: Gouie will arrive in August 2025 and Mina in 2027, expanding the fighting game's roster.

title: Granblue Fantasy Versus: Rising will launch on Nintendo Switch 2 in September with Id as DLC
summary: The fighting game confirms its release date on Nintendo's new console and includes downloadable character Id.

title: Sony will remove over 550 movies from PlayStation libraries, even if purchased
summary: Users will lose access to digitally purchased titles, sparking criticism about digital content ownership.

title: Xbox denies that there are more GTA 6 pre-orders on PlayStation than on Xbox
summary: The company responds to reports that indicated a gap in pre-orders between consoles.

title: Under Night In-Birth II receives a major update and new DLC character Zohar
summary: The fighting game adds important content along with downloadable fighter Zohar and other news.

title: Guilty Gear Strive launches Robo-Ky as a downloadable character on July 2
summary: The robotic fighter joins the fighting game's roster with its own set of skills.

title: Deltarune: guides and theories about chapters 5 and 6 of the acclaimed RPG
summary: Articles covering boss locations, alternative routes, and speculations about the next chapter of the saga.

title: Meccha Chameleon reaches 10 million copies sold in just 16 days
summary: The indie hide-and-seek game becomes a viral phenomenon and receives praise for its gameplay and price.

title: The manufacturing cost of the PS6 could approach $1,000
summary: Internal sources suggest that Sony's next console will be expensive due to its cutting-edge components.

title: Ubisoft Barcelona workers call strike over 51 layoffs
summary: The Spanish studio's staff protests against the job cuts announced by the company.

title: Mark Zuckerberg plans a betting app that would imitate Polymarket
summary: Meta's CEO would be developing a direct competitor for the decentralized prediction market.

title: A24 faces criticism for its association with Google's artificial intelligence
summary: Fans of the film studio do not accept the justification for the collaboration with Google AI.

title: Palworld's 1.0 update includes 27 pages of changes and new features
summary: The survival game receives a major update with substantial improvements in content and gameplay.

title: Surprise updates turn Path of Exile 2 into an ARPG giant
summary: The action role-playing game receives unexpected improvements that position it as the genre's most important release this year.

title: Riot announces League of Legends Classic and promises more details in two weeks
summary: The company prepares a classic version of its popular MOBA, generating excitement among the community.

title: Half-Life 2 and Portal can now be played in the browser thanks to a web port
summary: A group of developers manages to run Valve's classics directly in the browser without needing to install anything.

title: A speedrunner claims that a PC port of the original Spyro exists made without AI
summary: According to the runner, the port is in development and has been made entirely without artificial intelligence.
